items.title: An Amazon Delivery Drone Hit a Cable Line in Texas. What to Know.
items.description: The Federal Aviation Administration is investigating a midday Nov. 18 incident, when a MK30 drone struck a wire line in Waco, Texas.

items.title: Is Amazon.com (AMZN) One of The Best Quantum Computing Stocks to Invest In Right Now?
items.description: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the Best Quantum Computing Stocks to Invest In Right Now. On November 21, it was announced that United Launch Alliance (ULA) is now targeting December 15 for the Leo Atlas 4 (LA-04) mission. Named LA-04 for Amazon’s fourth launch on an Atlas V rocket, the mission would be sending another […]

items.title: Panasonic Energy to supply batteries to Amazon-backed Zoox
items.description: Panasonic Energy will supply its latest 2170-format cells, with deliveries scheduled to begin in early 2026.

items.title: Flight Of The Hyperscalers. How AI Sent Amazon, Google, Oracle, Microsoft, Meta On A Wild Ride
items.description: AI stocks entered a period of uncertainty as Wall Street has grown more queasy about growing costs and questions about the trend's direction.

items.title: Nvidia Just Lost $500 Billion--But Wall Street Still Won't Sell
items.description: As rivals like Alphabet circle, Nvidia's valuation plunges--but its AI growth story might only be getting started.
